summary: AWS Data Engineer with deep experience building Python, SQL, and PySpark data pipelines for large-scale enterprise platforms. Strong background migrating legacy/on-prem workloads into AWS-based data environments using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Spark, Hadoop/Hive, Parquet, and data validation practices. Experienced translating business and operational requirements into analytics-ready datasets while supporting stakeholder handoff, reporting accuracy, and pipeline reliability.

experience.title: Senior Data Engineer / AWS Migration Platform Engineer
bullets: Built hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL, Athena access patterns, and Redshift-backed workloads to support large-scale telemetry and forecasting datasets.
Developed Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing legacy manual processing with repeatable data workflows for reporting and analytics.
Migrated heavy forecasting and analytics workloads from on-prem Oracle systems into AWS-based processing environments, improving scalability for parallel data processing.
Built PySpark and Spark-oriented processing patterns for large structured telemetry datasets, supporting transformation, reporting, and downstream analytics needs.
Worked with Parquet-based data structures and optimized storage/reporting patterns to improve query performance and reduce small-file processing issues.
Applied data quality, validation, and reconciliation checks to maintain reporting consistency and confidence across production-facing data flows.

experience.title: Performance Engineer / Cloud Migration Support
bullets: Participated in AWS cloud migration planning by assessing monitoring, data collection, and operational readiness needs for critical hospitality systems.
Mined real-user performance metrics from Gomez Synthetic Monitoring to identify optimization opportunities and support engineering decision-making.
Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and other critical systems, supporting reliable operational visibility during platform changes.

experience.title: Senior Consultant / Enterprise Monitoring Data Engineer
bullets: Built Perl/Ksh automation scripts for recurring performance data extraction and operational reporting across enterprise monitoring environments.
Managed CA APM environments supporting 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents, producing standardized telemetry and reporting views for application and infrastructure teams.
Collaborated with J2EE/WebLogic teams to analyze bottlenecks identified through telemetry and support reliable production operations.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, Java, Perl, Ksh / Korn Shell Scripting
skills.Tools & Infra: Airflow, Docker, Git, Linux/Unix, Streamlit, BMC TrueSight, AppDynamics, CA APM, Dynatrace

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Built AWS-based lakehouse patterns using S3, Glue, Athena, PySpark, Parquet, and Snappy for scalable ETL processing and analytics-ready datasets. Focused on optimized storage layouts, small-file reduction, and reliable access patterns for enterprise-scale reporting workloads.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Developed Python and PySpark data pipelines that transformed large-scale telemetry data into forecasting-ready datasets and dashboards, reducing forecasting cycles by 90% and supporting capacity planning decisions.
